# CWE-1173 safe: gin validator binding enforced
lang: go
file: CWE-1173-safe.go
---
package sample

// CWE-1173 mitigated: ShouldBindJSON applies struct validation tags before insert.

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type SignupPayload struct {
	Email    string `binding:"required,email"`
	Password string `binding:"required,min=12"`
}

type Customer struct {
	ID       uint
	Email    string
	Password string
}

func SignupValidated(db *gorm.DB) gin.HandlerFunc {
	return func(c *gin.Context) {
		var payload SignupPayload
		if err := c.ShouldBindJSON(&payload); err != nil {
			c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
			return
		}
		rec := Customer{Email: payload.Email, Password: payload.Password}
		if err := db.Create(&rec).Error; err != nil {
			c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
			return
		}
		c.JSON(http.StatusCreated, gin.H{"id": rec.ID})
	}
}
